name: Scallops and Goat Cheese with Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound sun-dried tomatoes, oil-packed, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the spaghetti and cook until al dente. Drain and set aside.
2. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over high heat. Add crushed red pepper and minced garlic. Cook for about 30-40 seconds, stirring frequently.
3. Add the scallops in a single layer and stir-fry for 30-40 seconds. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
4. Reduce heat to medium-high. Add chopped tomatoes, sun-dried tomatoes, and parsley. Stir-fry for one minute.
5. Turn off the heat. Crumble goat cheese into the skillet and stir until melted and fully incorporated.
6. Return the scallops to the skillet and toss with the sauce. Mix thoroughly.
7. Drain the spaghetti and add it to the skillet. Toss gently to combine, ensuring the pasta does not become too hot or stick together.
8. Serve immediately.
